name: Different Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the ground beef and onion. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, seasonings, and soup. Mix well and set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking powder. Cut in Crisco until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add milk to the dry ingredients and mix until a soft dough forms.
4. Transfer the dough to a greased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
5. Spread the beef mixture evenly over the crust.
6. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese on top.
7. Bake at 400°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbly.
Recipe sourced from: Taste of Home Ground Beef Collection 1996 Edition
